title: Alpha — Product overview
description: Generic placeholder fixture exercising the lite SaaS-landing primitive sequence (hero + heading + paragraph + 3-column feature spotlight + CTA).

sections.title: A simpler way to ship
sections.lede: Bounded surface, opinionated defaults, zero hand-CSS.

sections.text: Three guarantees, each enforced at compile time: typed components, deterministic rendering, audited output.

items.title: Typed components
items.body: Every primitive parses with deny_unknown_fields; the wire format refuses smuggled shapes.

items.title: Deterministic builds
items.body: Same inputs produce identical outputs, byte-for-byte. Verified by chained build reports.

items.title: Audited output
items.body: Twenty-seven phases run on every build; strict findings block ship.

sections.title: Ready to evaluate?
sections.lede: The lite surface ships with five fixtures you can build right now.
